name: fde-os
description: The Forward Deployed Engineer toolkit: offline, CI-gated agent skills for discovery, evaluation, and decision-workflow mapping — plus an MCP server that exposes them as callable tools.

interface.shortDescription: The Forward Deployed Engineer toolkit — discovery, evaluation, and decision-workflow mapping skills.
interface.longDescription: FDE-os is the open toolkit a Forward Deployed Engineer actually deploys: offline, deterministic, CI-gated agent skills for the field. Run FDE-style discovery (delta-discovery-protocol, invisible-workflow-mapper), gate quality with evaluation (true-scorer, criteria-scorer, rag-eval-harness, eval-loop), and turn job descriptions and research into navigable knowledge (jd-compiler, knowledgefy). All skills are plain Markdown + dependency-free Python, so they install natively via Codex; the bundled fde-mcp-server exposes six of them as callable MCP tools.
defaultPrompt: Run the delta-discovery-protocol on this customer problem
Use invisible-workflow-mapper to reconstruct how this org makes decisions
Gate this RAG system with rag-eval-harness
